calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets [Probate Code 850 (A)(3)]
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vanessa Sundin for Petitioner.

The Court noted that this is an 850 petition on a property that was in the trust, that it was taken out of the trust in the context of a refinance and that the property was never returned to the trust. Ms. Sundin stated that she filed a supplemental declaration that provides further context. The Court stated that the declaration did not provide any evidence of the Trustors particular intent. Ms. Sundin stated that this is typical when being assisted by someone when refinancing to be required to transfer title of the property, that the Spouse was also involved in the process and had conversation with the Decedent, and that their impression was that the documents signed for the refinancing would put the property back in the trust. Ms. Sundin also stated that it was the Decedent and the Spouse's expectation and understanding that the property was in the trust, that she can see if there was any communication between the lender and the escrow company if there was any conversation about, that the property was in the trust, that the pour over will puts the property back in the trust and that there are no objections by anyone. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
